article_title: Ecolab Acquires Liquid Cooling Specialist CoolIT Systems for $4.75 Billion as AI Data Centers Outgrow Air Cooling

content_preview.title: Ecolab Acquires Liquid Cooling Specialist CoolIT Systems for $4.75 Billion as AI Data Centers Outgrow Air Cooling
content_preview.summary: Water treatment giant Ecolab is buying CoolIT Systems from KKR in an all-cash deal that values the Calgary-based liquid cooling company at roughly 18 times its price just three years ago, reflecting the explosive demand for direct-to-chip cooling in AI data centers.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Ecolab, the St. Paul, Minnesota-based water treatment and hygiene conglomerate, has agreed to acquire CoolIT Systems, a Canadian specialist in liquid cooling hardware for AI data centers, in a [$4.75 billion all-cash transaction](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260319353197/en/Ecolab-to-Acquire-CoolIT-Systems-a-Global-Leader-in-Advanced-Liquid-Cooling-for-Next-Gen-AI-Data-Centers).
